cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir. I'm calling about the Galaxy Watch listed on Cashify Marketplace. Is it still under warranty, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, Ram Prasad ji, thank you for calling. Yes, the watch is still under warranty. It's a brand new piece, hardly used.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that's great. Do you have the original bill for the watch?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, I do have the original bill. Would you like me to send it to you, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: No, no need. I just wanted to confirm. How long has the watch been listed, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It's been listed for about a week now. We've had a few inquiries, but no one has made an offer yet.
